---
title: "Tier 3 — Algebra II / Geometry / Trigonometry"
subtitle: "Grade 10–11 · planned, not yet built"
---

::: {.callout-note}
This tier is **planned but not yet authored.** See [`_curriculum.yml`](/_curriculum.yml)
for the topic plan and the [Home page](/index.qmd) for build status.
:::

## Planned scope

Quadratics and conics · trigonometry (unit circle, identities) · sequences
and series · logarithms and exponentials · combinatorics · basic
probability distributions.

[← Back to Home](/index.qmd)
